name: MAX Power Mining Corp.
description: MAX Power Mining Corp. is a Canadian first-mover in natural hydrogen exploration, holding approximately 1.3 million acres (521,000 hectares) of permits in Saskatchewan. The company confirmed Canada's first subsurface natural hydrogen system at its Lawson well near Central Butte, Saskatchewan in early 2026, and has since drilled a second well at Bracken demonstrating multi-zone hydrogen and helium intervals. MAX Power is at the exploration and test-of-concept stage, evaluating the commercial viability of a basin-scale natural hydrogen discovery.
